programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: While Cricket shows Remy the fun of country life, Tilly seeks new sleeping arrangements; Cricket tries to win back his old country friend, Hector.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Remy attempts to find his country grit while Cricket takes tractor-driving lessons; Phoenix journeys back to Big City to retrieve Saxon while Gramma and Gloria go to a club.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Brooke Dillman guest stars as diner owner Patti; Nancy tries to get Cricket to cut his new rat tail without admitting that she hates it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Tilly makes changes to her country's coming-of-age ceremony and Gramma wants none of it; Cricket fast-tracks his training for a rodeo and gets trapped in a never-ending montage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: A pizza delivery girl from Big City has to flee from a crazed country family; when Bill gets a horse for the day, Tilly must hide how much she secretly hates horses.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: Tilly and Andromeda exchange letters that reveal their outlooks on the world; Remy enlists the Greens to help him lie to his parents about his week in the country.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Helen struggles to write this year's school musical; Kiff decides to help Chubbles look for a new job.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.sub-title: Uncle Pat in Charge; Fab Fourteen
programme.desc: Uncle Pat takes babysitting Kiff very seriously. Barry is in charge of throwing a Fab Fourteen for his cousin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ratatouille
programme.desc: Remy (Patton Oswalt), a resident of Paris, appreciates good food and has quite a sophisticated palate. He would love to become a chef so he can create and enjoy culinary masterpieces to his heart's delight. The only problem is, Remy is a rat. When he winds up in the sewer beneath one of Paris' finest restaurants, the rodent gourmet finds himself ideally placed to realize his dream.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: Cricket discovers lake life brings out Bill's fun-loving side; when rabbits threaten to destroy Bill's crops, Nancy enlists their country friends to save the harvest.

programme.title: Toy Story 2
programme.desc: Woody (Tom Hanks) is stolen from his home by toy dealer Al McWhiggin (Wayne Knight), leaving Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen) and the rest of the gang to try to rescue him. But when Woody discovers that he's actually a valuable collectible from a once-popular television show called "Woody's Roundup" and is reunited with his horse Bullseye, Jessie the yodeling cowgirl (Joan Cusack) and his faithful sidekick, Stinky Pete the Prospector (Kelsey Grammer), he doesn't want to leave.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Toy Story 3
programme.desc: With their beloved Andy preparing to leave for college, Woody (Tom Hanks), Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen), Jessie (Joan Cusack), and the rest of the toys find themselves headed for the attic but mistakenly wind up on the curb with the trash. Woody's quick thinking saves the gang, but all but Woody end up being donated to a day-care center. Unfortunately, the uncontrollable kids do not play nice, so Woody and the gang make plans for a great escape.

programme.title: Toy Story 4
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz Lightyear and the rest of the gang embark on a road trip with Bonnie and a new toy named Forky. The adventurous journey turns into an unexpected reunion as Woody's slight detour leads him to his long-lost friend Bo Peep. As Woody and Bo discuss the old days, they soon start to realize that they're worlds apart when it comes to what they want from life as a toy.
